notes.claude: Verified Claude toggles cover project skills, project .mcp.json approvals, and settings-file tools.
notes.codex: Verified Codex toggles cover global and project skills plus global config.toml mcp_servers sections; plugins remain unsupported.
notes.cursor: Verified Cursor toggles cover global skills plus global mcp.json configured MCP entries, including optional workspace disabled-server reconciliation; extensions remain unsupported.
notes.zed: Verified Zed toggles cover global and project .agents skills plus context_servers entries in Zed settings; instructions and settings remain read-only.
